subject: [POLICY] Do not push policies to policy-engine
commit_message:
[POLICY] Do not push policies to policy-engine

Removed the script to push policies to policy-engine, as Policy
now uses PAP, not policy-engine, to load policies.

Issue-ID: POLICY-2525
Signed-off-by: Jim Hahn <jrh3@att.com>
Change-Id: I19fb09c87251a5faa3b529253d7c294f34c46fdd
